questions.question: What nation's highest point is atop Kanchenjunga mountain?
What movie gave Humphrey Bogart the line: "I remember every detail. The Germans wore gray. You wore blue"?
What UN secretary general got stuck with trying to resolve the Cuban Missile Crisis?
What new name did Manchester surgeon James Braid coin for mesmerism, in 1843?
Who started the Professional Chess Association in 1993, leaving the World Chess Federation title to rival Anatoly Karpov?
What Disneyland peak claimed the park's first fatality, in 1964?
